requirement_topic.en: Transport Safety — UN 38.3 and Australian Dangerous Goods Code
requirement_topic.zh: 运输安全——UN 38.3及澳大利亚危险货物规则
requirement_topic.zht: 運輸安全——UN 38.3及澳洲危險貨物規則

summary.en: Lithium cells, lithium battery packs, and power banks are dangerous goods for transport. Before transport, lithium batteries must have UN 38.3 test evidence covering the specific cell or battery design. For road and rail movement in Australia, the Australian Dangerous Goods Code (ADG Code) is the national technical code adopted through state and territory dangerous-goods laws. Lithium ion batteries are generally shipped as UN 3480, or UN 3481 when packed with or contained in equipment, with Class 9 marking, packaging, documentation, and handling controls as applicable.
summary.zh: 锂电芯、锂电池组及移动电源在运输中属于危险货物。运输前，锂电池必须具备覆盖具体电芯或电池设计的UN 38.3测试证据。澳大利亚境内公路及铁路运输适用《澳大利亚危险货物规则》（ADG Code），该规则作为国家技术规则由各州及领地危险货物法律采纳。锂离子电池通常按UN 3480运输；与设备一起包装或装在设备中时按UN 3481运输，并按适用情况满足第9类标识、包装、文件及操作控制。
summary.zht: 鋰電芯、鋰電池組及行動電源在運輸中屬於危險貨物。運輸前，鋰電池必須具備覆蓋具體電芯或電池設計的UN 38.3測試證據。澳洲境內公路及鐵路運輸適用《澳洲危險貨物規則》（ADG Code），該規則作為國家技術規則由各州及領地危險貨物法律採納。鋰離子電池通常按UN 3480運輸；與設備一起包裝或裝在設備中時按UN 3481運輸，並按適用情況滿足第9類標識、包裝、文件及操作控制。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3 — Lithium metal and lithium ion batteries — mandatory transport test evidence under dangerous-goods transport frameworks
Australian Code for the Transport of Dangerous Goods by Road & Rail (ADG Code) — mandatory where adopted by state and territory dangerous-goods laws
UN 3480 — Lithium ion batteries; UN 3481 — Lithium ion batteries packed with equipment or contained in equipment
IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations and ICAO Technical Instructions — mandatory for air transport through applicable aviation dangerous-goods rules

summary.en: Chinese exporters commonly hold UN 38.3 reports, a test summary, MSDS/SDS, dangerous-goods classification, and air or sea transport certificates. China also applies dangerous-goods transport controls through CAAC, maritime, customs, and domestic road-transport rules. Those documents are often transferable technical evidence, but Australian road/rail shipments still need ADG Code classification, marking, packaging, documentation, and carrier acceptance checks.
summary.zh: 中国出口商通常持有UN 38.3报告、测试概要、MSDS/SDS、危险品分类以及空运或海运运输证书。中国还通过民航、海事、海关及国内道路运输规则实施危险货物运输管控。这些文件通常可作为可转用的技术证据，但澳大利亚公路/铁路运输仍需进行ADG规则下的分类、标识、包装、文件及承运人接受核查。
summary.zht: 中國出口商通常持有UN 38.3報告、測試概要、MSDS/SDS、危險品分類以及空運或海運運輸證書。中國還透過民航、海事、海關及國內道路運輸規則實施危險貨物運輸管控。這些文件通常可作為可轉用的技術證據，但澳洲公路/鐵路運輸仍需進行ADG規則下的分類、標識、包裝、文件及承運人接受核查。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3
CAAC dangerous goods air transport requirements
IMDG Code for maritime dangerous goods transport
GB 12268 and JT/T 617 domestic dangerous-goods transport references

gap.en: UN 38.3 is usually not the gap for mature Chinese exporters; the gap is matching the report to the actual exported SKU and translating transport evidence into Australian consignment controls. The Australian importer and carrier should verify UN number, watt-hour rating, state of charge for air cargo, package instructions, lithium battery mark/Class 9 labels, emergency information, and ADG Code transport documentation before domestic distribution.
gap.zh: 对于成熟中国出口商，UN 38.3通常不是主要差距；差距在于报告是否对应实际出口SKU，以及如何将运输证据转换为澳大利亚托运控制。澳大利亚进口商及承运人应在境内分销前核查UN编号、瓦时额定值、空运货物荷电状态、包装指令、锂电池标记/第9类标签、应急信息及ADG规则运输文件。
gap.zht: 對於成熟中國出口商，UN 38.3通常不是主要差距；差距在於報告是否對應實際出口SKU，以及如何將運輸證據轉換為澳洲託運控制。澳洲進口商及承運人應在境內分銷前核查UN編號、瓦時額定值、空運貨物荷電狀態、包裝指令、鋰電池標記/第9類標籤、應急資訊及ADG規則運輸文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — UN 38.3 evidence is required for lithium batteries under transport rules; ADG Code controls are mandatory for Australian road and rail transport where adopted by state and territory law; IATA/ICAO dangerous-goods controls are mandatory for air transport
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for transport — UN 38.3 and dangerous-goods documentation are required for relevant China export transport modes; Australian ADG Code documentation is separate

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Keep UN 38.3 test reports and summaries tied to the exact cell and pack model, then prepare Australian ADG transport documents for road/rail distribution after import. A Chinese air or sea shipment certificate helps, but it does not by itself close the Australian ADG consignment file.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将UN 38.3测试报告及概要与准确的电芯和电池组型号绑定，并在进口后为澳大利亚公路/铁路分销准备ADG运输文件。中国空运或海运证书有帮助，但其本身不能完整关闭澳大利亚ADG托运文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將UN 38.3測試報告及概要與準確的電芯和電池組型號綁定，並在進口後為澳洲公路/鐵路分銷準備ADG運輸文件。中國空運或海運證書有幫助，但其本身不能完整關閉澳洲ADG託運文件。
